pokemon:regidrago.name: Regidrago
pokemon:regidrago.summary: Its body is composed of crystallized dragon energy. Regidrago is said to have the powers of every dragon Pokémon.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Its body is composed of crystallized dragon energy. Regidrago is said to have the powers of every dragon Pokémon.
An academic theory proposes that Regidrago’s arms were once the head of an ancient dragon Pokémon. The theory remains unproven.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Its body is composed of crystallized dragon energy. Regidrago is said to have the powers of every dragon Pokémon.
